_comment: Placeholder for v36 subagent-ID-prefix → role-slug mapping. Populate from a scan of <DELIVERABLE_TREE>/SESSIONS_LOGS/subagents/ after the run closes. Each key is the first 3 chars of the subagent's sessionId (or whatever stable prefix extract_flow.py keys on); each value is the role slug used in the generated sub-<role>.md filenames. See docs/zcprecipator2/scripts/role_map_v34.json for the legacy example and runs/v35/role_map.json for the v35 shape.
_expected_roles_showcase: writer-2-fix (only if writer-1 failed and a retry was dispatched)
_headline_signal: If v36 shows writer-1 ONLY (no -fix variants) on showcase tier, the Cx-BRIEF-OVERFLOW fix closed the v35 3-dispatch retry pattern.
